title: Catch Up on Marketing Activities
summary: Joe, Michael, and Paulo discussed social media feedback, strategy clarity, and content development. Michael presented work on the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) which led to Joe approving a $349 monthly subscription for automation. Joe relayed Vinnie's decision to hire an external ABM firm and raised concerns, while Michael presented a BDC self-assessment app as a lead magnet with a two-week plan focused on lead generation through email and social campaigns.

decisions.description: Approved a $349 monthly subscription for automated ICP development.
Committed to push Vinnie for details on the external ABM firm's targets.
To fully integrate the self-assessment lead magnet into the current site and social rotation.
Joe will send Michael an email regarding the payment.

actionItems.task: Push Jason to provide feedback on the social media posts.

expectedOutcome.description: Jason to provide feedback to the marketing team for future improvements.

actionItems.task: Push Vinnie to determine what reporting can be obtained from the external ABM firm and to get more information on the firm.

expectedOutcome.description: Shared reporting on markets, dealers, and groups being targeted by the ABM firm to prevent conflicting efforts and messaging.

actionItems.task: Send Michael Donovan the outline of his concerns and recommendations regarding the other firm.

expectedOutcome.description: Michael understands the constraints imposed by the engagement with the external ABM firm.

actionItems.task: Put together a two-week plan focused on email, social media, landing pages, and driving leads, then reassess with Joe Furnari.

expectedOutcome.description: A documented plan mapping out the workflow and a calendar view for the two-week campaign, aiming to generate leads.

actionItems.task: Charge the monthly subscription for the model or platform to his credit card.

expectedOutcome.description: Successful payment of the monthly subscription fee.

tensions: Joe's concerns about channel conflict and data attribution due to Vinnie's decision to hire an external ABM firm.
Vinnie's refusal to entertain a unified strategy between the internal team and the external ABM firm.
Disagreement between Michael and Joe on the timeline to integrate the BDC assessment tool.
Joe's concerns that Michael's timelines are unrealistic.
Jason may be uncomfortable with the ABM's firm lead engagement process.
referencesToPast: Mention of previous discussion on map hours and contact enrichment.
Mentioned they talked about these groups last week.
